title: fontquera paui
intro: Fontquera paui, also known as Fontquer's Paui or Spanish Heath, is a type of flowering plant in the heath family. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe coughs and relieve congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory problems. Fontquera paui can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
